# subtitle_card_overlap_check

```yaml
status: passed_no_high_severity_overlap_detected_by_layout
subtitle_present: true
subtitle_mode: burned_full_locked_copy_subtitles
caption_srt_exists: true
high_severity_overlap: false
card_blocks_key_evidence: false
subtitle_blocks_key_evidence: false
method:
  - subtitles rendered in bottom safe band
  - cards keep main claim centered and subtitles in separate lower band
  - final contact sheet sampled first 10s, every 20s, and final CTA
remaining_risk:
  - dense source text remains small in some workflow/report shots
  - user final watch-through still required for subjective readability
```
